title: Pyorite
description: Mod that adds mainly combat based items and features.
body:
# Pyorite
## Passion project mod of a lot of combat and misc additions!

### devlog, crafting recipes and sneak peaks at the [pyorite website](https://pridalkomark.github.io/pyorite/website/index.html)!

### New...
* Materials
* Weapons
* Items
* Armo*u*r
* Decoration

![Item Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe49d2ae07cb8a109012693e9ca9335b9b01b5f.png)

### Items:
* Shwrappel (fuel source for the Hand Cannon)
* Pyorite Chunk (the main resource in almost every single recipe)
* Elementite Ingot and Upgrade template (can be used to make the Elementite Scythe with)

### Weapons:
#### Elementite Scythe
* 11 attack damage
* 1 attack speed
* Really nice for close combat!
* (made in a smithing template with a netherite hoe, elementite upgrade template and an elementite ingot)
#### Gilded Netherite GreatSword
* 15.6 attack damage
* 0.5 attack speed
* This weapon is used for heavy hitting! 
* (with great power comes a expensive recipe)
#### Hand Cannon
* 6 projectile damage
* Makeshift flame thrower go brrrr!
* (you need to have shwrappel in your off-hand for this weapon to work)

### Edibles (yummers 😋):
* Creeper Glazed Cookie (if you eat it there's a 50-50 percent chance you will either explode or survive)

### "Some Other Stuff that can be useful"™️:
* You can find Elementite Upgrade Templates in the ancient city
* Shwrappel can sometimes drop from creepers

### Credits, please check them out!:
* [InfinityFarzad](https://modrinth.com/user/InfinityFarzad) for the scythe texture tweaks and code help 🙏
* [Nitron](https://modrinth.com/user/n1tr0n__) for their suggestions and code
* 
* brain
